narrative:
West Chester Twp 19 (precinct in Butler County) has 990 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.6 percentage points.
